data.Name: Drogon Valysar - DG2 Reservoir Estimated Volumes (RAW, per realisation, ×0.8)
data.Description: DG2 uncertainty realisation table for the Valysar zone. Pore-dependent volume columns (PoreOil, Oil, Gas, etc.) scaled by 0.8 relative to DG1 to reflect revised porosity interpretation. Bulk rock volumes unchanged. 12 columns, 3 realisations × 7 segments × 4 facies.
